title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.190 - Return, when sworn to and by whom signed
text:
532.190.  Return, when sworn to and by whom signed. — The return must be signed by the person making the same, and except where such person shall be a sworn public officer, and shall make his return in his official capacity, it shall be verified by his oath.
(RSMo 1939 § 1606) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1442; 1919 § 1892; 1909 § 2457
